Online ATC

FMMM

FMMM CTR

Station: Antananarivo Center (FMMM_CTR)
Area Coverage: The ground and skies of Madagascar, Comoros and La Reunion.
Time of Logon: 10:00z
Time of Logoff: 12:00z

FNAN

FNAN CTR

Station: Luanda Control (FNAN_CTR)
Area Coverage: The ground and skies of Angola, including Luanda Oceanic and St. Helena (FHSH).
Time of Logon: 10:00z
Time of Logoff: 12:00z
